# External Purchase Server API changelog

**Article**

Learn about new features and updates in the External Purchase Server API.

## Overview

Use this changelog to learn about feature updates, deprecations, and removals for the External Purchase Server API.

## 1.2.0 — 2025/06/26

**New features**

- Added support for new custom link token types, `ACQUISITION` and `SERVICES`.
- Added DUPLICATE_TOKEN possible value in [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/status] and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/ExternalPurchaseReport] objects.
- Added errors [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/LineItemCreationDateOutOfRangeError] and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/DuplicateTokenStatusNotAllowedError].

## 1.1.0 — 2025/04/14

**New features**

- Added errors [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RestatementCreationDateMismatchError], [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RestatementNotAllowedCreationDateError], and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RefundNotAllowedCreationDateError].

## Server update — 2024/03/05

Initial release.

## 1.0.0 — 2024/02/29

Initial beta release with functionality enabled for sandbox testing.

## 0.1.0 — 2024/01/25

Initial beta release for preview.

## Essentials

- **Creating API keys to authorize API requests**: Create API keys you use to sign JSON Web Tokens and authorize API requests.
- **Generating JSON Web Tokens for API requests**: Create JSON Web Tokens signed with your private key to authorize requests for App Store Server API and External Purchase Server API.
